description: Union manifest: foundations (URL-linked), paper, and improvements graphs.

nodes.title: Finite-Sum Objective
nodes.summary: The global objective f(w)=(1/n) sum_i f_i(w): an unweighted average of per-example losses, the target FedAvg minimizes.

nodes.title: Client-Partition Decomposition
nodes.summary: f(w)=sum_k (n_k/n) F_k(w): an exact algebraic identity rewriting the objective as a data-size-weighted convex combination of per-client losses.

nodes.title: IID vs Non-IID
nodes.summary: IID means E_{P_k}[F_k(w)]=f(w) (each client's loss is an unbiased proxy for the global); non-IID is the failure of this identity.

nodes.title: FedSGD as Exact Gradient Descent
nodes.summary: sum_k (n_k/n) g_k = grad f(w_t), so FedSGD (B=inf,E=1,C=1) is exactly distributed full-batch gradient descent.

nodes.title: Gradient- vs Model-Averaging Equivalence
nodes.summary: Averaging one local gradient step equals one global step because sum_k n_k/n = 1; the hinge that lets FedSGD be reorganized as model averaging.

nodes.title: FedAvg: Iterated Local Steps
nodes.summary: FedAvg iterates the local SGD step tau>1 times before averaging; for tau>=2 the round map is no longer any number of centralized GD steps.

nodes.title: Local-Update Count u=nE/(KB)
nodes.summary: u_k=E n_k/B local updates per client; expected u=nE/(KB). The (C,E,B) knob that trades on-device compute for communication rounds.

nodes.title: Heterogeneity Gap = eta^2 Cov_k(H_k,g_k)
nodes.summary: For E>1 the per-round deviation from centralized GD is, to leading order, eta^2 Cov_k(H_k,g_k): a pure client-heterogeneity term (zero when IID).

nodes.title: Client-Sampling Unbiasedness (Horvitz-Thompson)
nodes.summary: Under uniform client sampling, inverse-probability (Horvitz-Thompson) weighting makes the partial-participation gradient an unbiased estimator of grad f.

nodes.title: Aggregation Erratum: normalize by m_t
nodes.summary: The corrected average w_{t+1}=sum_{k in S} (n_k/m_t) w^k (m_t over selected clients); summing n_k/n instead shrinks the model by the factor C each round.

nodes.title: Parameter Averaging & Jensen
nodes.summary: For convex F_k, Jensen gives f(avg) <= avg f, so averaging is safe; non-convex nets have no such guarantee.

nodes.title: Shared-Init & the Permutation Barrier
nodes.summary: Independently-initialized nets land in incompatible permutation-orbit basins (Fig 1 barrier); FedAvg broadcasts a shared w_t each round to keep clients in one basin.

nodes.title: Control-Variate Drift Correction
nodes.summary: SCAFFOLD-style local step g_local - c_k + c cancels the eta^2 Cov_k(H_k,g_k) drift; prototype: 1.62x fewer non-IID rounds. Validation: proofs/heterogeneity-control-variate.tex.

nodes.title: Unbiased Aggregation Estimators
nodes.summary: Horvitz-Thompson / size-proportional sampling restore exact unbiasedness lost by the self-normalized n_k/m_t average under imbalance. Validation: proofs/unbiased-aggregation.tex.

nodes.title: Adaptive Local-Work Schedule
nodes.summary: Decay E (or grow B) over rounds like a learning rate to dodge the large-E plateau; prototype beats every fixed E. Validation: improvements/adaptive-local-work.py measure().

nodes.title: Compute-Accounting Pareto (design)
nodes.summary: Measure the unquantified 'computation is free' premise: report a rounds-vs-total-on-device-compute Pareto frontier. Design proposal (E.2); link-only.

nodes.title: Permutation-Aligned Averaging (Git Re-Basin for FL)
nodes.summary: Align client models modulo permutation before averaging to relax the shared-init requirement; prototype flips barrier +0.024 -> -0.023. Validation: proofs/permutation-aligned-averaging.tex.

nodes.title: Federated LoRA (design)
nodes.summary: Run FedAvg over LoRA adapters only: per-round communication drops from Theta(B) to Theta(rank*dim) (4.3% in the sandbox). Design proposal (T.2); link-only.

nodes.title: Effective-ODE Averaging Bound
nodes.summary: Idealizing each client's u_k local steps as the gradient flow of F_k for time T=eta*u_k makes the server-vs-centralized drift exactly (T^2/2)||Cov_k(H_k,g_k)||+O(T^3): turns the deep dive's heuristic eta^2 Cov_k(H_k,g_k) into a theorem and corrects its prefactor (heuristic underpredicts by u_k^2/4, ~6x at E=5); single invariant T=eta*E*n_k/B. Validation: proofs/effective-ode-averaging-bound.tex.

nodes.title: Horizon-Equalized Local Flow
nodes.summary: A round of local SGD integrates client k's gradient flow for time T_k=eta*E*n_k/B; under size imbalance vanilla FedAvg lets T_k vary, injecting a first-order drift -Cov_k(T_k,g_k). Fix: per-client eta_k=T*/u_k so T_k=T* for all clients (no extra comms/state). Prototype: no-op when balanced, +0->+2.2 mean rounds as imbalance grows. Validation: improvements/horizon-equalized-local-flow.py measure().
